text: I feel a curious anticipation standing here, surrounded by glass and signs of careful design. The sterile, orderly meeting room beyond the glass contrasts with the vibrant, thought-provoking R+D exhibition. My mind oscillates between the structure of bureaucracy and the invitation to imagine and create. There is an underlying sense of hope—a belief that within these boundaries, ideas can grow and connect. I am both observer and participant, quietly eager for discovery.
